statement: In every magma, Equation 2719 (`x = ((y * x) * (z * x)) * w`) implies Equation 684 (`x = y * (x * ((y * z) * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0641
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y x) (op z x)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op x (op (op y z) z)))
